summary.business_type: Niche content / reference site — German Berlin dialect dictionary (Berlinerisch → Hochdeutsch), Astro SSG on Cloudflare Pages, 916 word entries
top_findings: BreadcrumbList schema has .html suffix and relative @id on all 916 word pages — breadcrumb rich results suppressed site-wide
AI search crawlers (ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot, ClaudeBot) blocked in robots.txt — site invisible to ChatGPT/Claude search answers
/games/berliner-oder-nicht has no H1 and no meta description — unrankable for any dialect quiz query
Every CSS stylesheet loaded twice — unnecessary double-download on all pages
No llms.txt — missing structured AI discovery signal
quick_wins: Fix BreadcrumbList @id in schema template (strip .html, use absolute URLs) — 1 line, unblocks breadcrumb rich results for 916 pages
Add OAI-SearchBot and ChatGPT-User Allow in robots.txt — unlocks ChatGPT search visibility
Create /public/llms.txt — static file, minutes of work
Add H1 and meta description to games page

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HTTP/2 enabled via Cloudflare
HSTS with preload configured
X-Content-Type-Options and Referrer-Policy headers present
All canonical URLs correct and absolute
robots.txt well-structured with Sitemap declaration
Cloudflare Speculation Rules for prefetch active

findings.title: BreadcrumbList @id uses .html suffix on all 916 word pages
findings.description: Last BreadcrumbList item carries @id /wort/aalen.html while canonical URL is /wort/aalen. Systematic across 916 pages — suppresses breadcrumb rich results site-wide.
findings.recommendation: Strip .html in the BreadcrumbList builder and use absolute URLs.

findings.title: BreadcrumbList @id values are relative paths
findings.description: All breadcrumb @id values are relative (e.g. /wort). Google requires absolute IRIs.
findings.recommendation: Prefix all @id with https://berliner-schnauze.wtf.

findings.title: CSS loaded twice on every page
findings.description: Each stylesheet included as print+onload AND synchronous link — browser downloads and parses every CSS file twice.
findings.recommendation: Remove one copy. Keep only synchronous link or only async pattern with noscript fallback.

findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy header
findings.description: No CSP present on any page.
findings.recommendation: Add via Cloudflare _headers file.

findings.title: Cache-Control: max-age=0 on all HTML
findings.description: Static site with no browser cache — every navigation triggers revalidation.
findings.recommendation: Set max-age=3600, stale-while-revalidate=86400 in _headers.

findings.title: /games/berliner-oder-nicht missing H1 and meta description
findings.description: Page is indexable but has no heading signal and no meta description.
findings.recommendation: Add static H1 in .astro file and wire through seoData().

findings.title: Missing X-Frame-Options header
findings.description: No clickjacking protection.
findings.recommendation: Add X-Frame-Options: DENY to _headers.

findings.title: Missing Permissions-Policy header
findings.description: No browser feature access control.
findings.recommendation: Add restrictive Permissions-Policy to _headers.

findings.title: Some meta descriptions at 163 chars (over 160 limit)
findings.description: Google truncates at ~155-160 chars.
findings.recommendation: Trim truncation guard threshold.

findings.title: Datenschutz and Impressum fully indexable
findings.description: Legal pages consume index budget with no search value.
findings.recommendation: Add noindex meta to both pages.

findings.title: IndexNow not detected
findings.description: No near-instant URL submission to Bing/Yandex.
findings.recommendation: Enable via Cloudflare dashboard — no code required.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: All word pages have meta descriptions
All images have alt text
Rich heading hierarchy per word page (H2: Etymologie, Beispiele, Phonologie etc.)
Internal links to 15 alphabetical neighbors per page
dateCreated/dateModified in schema and visible on pages
Founder and sameAs in Organization schema

findings.title: Games page missing H1 and meta description
findings.description: Vue client:only island means no server-rendered H1; description not wired through seoData().
findings.recommendation: Add static H1 in .astro file; pass page object through seoData().

findings.title: Thin content risk from formulaic template assembly
findings.description: 916 pages ~339 words each, CMS-assembled — sparse entries expose thin content pattern matching March 2024 core update targets.
findings.recommendation: Require minimum populated field count before sitemap inclusion. Add build-time word count gate.

findings.title: Word page H1 contains only bare dialect term
findings.description: H1 'aalen' carries no keyword context for queries like 'aalen Berlinerisch Bedeutung'.
findings.recommendation: Add subtitle with primary translation below H1.

findings.title: Homepage H1 dialectal phrasing reduces keyword clarity
findings.description: 'Na Keule, keen'n Dunst vom Berlinern?' has no keyword signal for 'Berlinerisch Wörterbuch'.
findings.recommendation: Add keyword-aligned plain-German subtitle as server-rendered content.

findings.title: No About/editorial methodology page
findings.description: No /ueber page explaining curation, sources, or editorial methodology — E-E-A-T gap.
findings.recommendation: Create /ueber-das-projekt covering methodology and contributor info.

findings.title: Meta description overrun on some pages
findings.description: 2 of 15 sampled at 163 chars.
findings.recommendation: Review truncation logic for verbose entries.

findings.title: Legal pages lack noindex
findings.description: Datenschutz and Impressum indexed with no SEO value.
findings.recommendation: Add noindex meta.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: DefinedTerm well-implemented with termCode, inDefinedTermSet, mainEntityOfPage, inLanguage, dateCreated/Modified
WebSite and Organization schema on homepage
Organization has founder, logo, sameAs
BreadcrumbList present on all pages (though buggy)

findings.title: BreadcrumbList: relative @id and .html suffix on all pages
findings.description: Both defects combined suppress breadcrumb rich results across entire word section.
findings.recommendation: Manually construct BreadcrumbList using canonicalUrl() helper, prefixing origin.

findings.title: WebSite missing potentialAction SearchAction
findings.description: No Sitelinks Search Box eligible. Site has Orama-powered search — high value missed.
findings.recommendation: Add SearchAction with urlTemplate to WebSite schema.

findings.title: Organization missing @id self-referential IRI
findings.description: No @id means Google can't unify entity across pages.
findings.recommendation: Add @id: 'https://berliner-schnauze.wtf/#organization'.

findings.title: Games page has no schema markup
findings.description: Zero structured data on /games/berliner-oder-nicht.
findings.recommendation: Add VideoGame schema + BreadcrumbList.

findings.title: DefinedTermSet missing @id and numberOfItems
findings.description: Every word page embeds anonymous inline copy instead of referencing shared IRI.
findings.recommendation: Add @id: 'https://berliner-schnauze.wtf/wort#termset' and numberOfItems: 916.

categories.name: Sitemap
what_works: sitemap-index.xml + sitemap-0.xml structure valid
930 URLs well within 50,000 limit
No .html URLs in sitemap
Declared in robots.txt
No priority or changefreq (Google ignores both)

findings.title: All lastmod values are identical build timestamps
findings.description: Every URL has same lastmod (2026-06-29T15:24:22.235Z) — Google stops trusting lastmod for entire sitemap.
findings.recommendation: Use WordPress 'modified' field for word entries; static dates for others.

findings.title: Application UI pages in sitemap (/settings, /settings/cache)
findings.description: PWA settings pages are client-only shells with no indexable content.
findings.recommendation: Exclude from sitemap filter; add noindex meta.

findings.title: Share result page in sitemap
findings.description: /games/berliner-oder-nicht/share is URL-param-driven client-only shell.
findings.recommendation: Exclude from sitemap; add noindex.

findings.title: wort-vorschlagen in sitemap (form page)
findings.description: Audit rendered content — keep only if meaningful prose present.
findings.recommendation: Verify content quality before keeping in sitemap.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Astro SSG — all pages are static HTML
Cloudflare Pages CDN with global PoPs
HTTP/2 enabled
Cloudflare Speculation Rules for prefetch
Font preloads declared in head
Critical CSS inlined (Beasties)

findings.title: PageSpeed Insights data unavailable (rate limited)
findings.description: Could not obtain CrUX or lab metrics during audit.
findings.recommendation: Run pagespeed_check.py in a fresh session to obtain LCP, INP, CLS scores.

findings.title: CSS double-load adds render overhead
findings.description: Each stylesheet parsed twice per page load.
findings.recommendation: Remove duplicate link tags.

findings.title: Cache-Control: max-age=0 on HTML
findings.description: Every navigation requires server round-trip for revalidation.
findings.recommendation: Increase max-age for HTML pages via _headers.

findings.title: font-display: fallback on body fonts
findings.description: 100ms invisible-text block period on cold cache; 3s swap window may cause CLS.
findings.recommendation: Document deliberate choice or consider size-adjust fallback descriptors to minimise shift.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: Astro SSG provides optimal static HTML — no JS required for AI crawlers
DefinedTerm schema with termCode, inLanguage, inDefinedTermSet is above-average for a dictionary
Deliberate TDMREP Content-Signal: search=yes, ai-train=no — legitimate copyright policy
All content server-rendered — fully accessible to headless crawlers

findings.title: AI search crawlers blocked alongside training crawlers
findings.description: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, ChatGPT-User, Google-Extended blocked — conflates training bots with search/answer bots. Site invisible to ChatGPT, Claude, Google AIO, Apple Intelligence.
findings.recommendation: Allow OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, PerplexityBot selectively. Retain GPTBot block if training opt-out desired.

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.description: /llms.txt returns 404. Emerging standard for LLM content guidance.
findings.recommendation: Create /public/llms.txt with site description, licensing, key page links.

findings.title: No Speakable schema
findings.description: For a dialect dictionary with pronunciation data, Speakable markup enables Google AIO audio and voice agents.
findings.recommendation: Add Speakable to DefinedTerm marking description and comment fields.

findings.title: Section headings are topic labels not question-format
findings.description: 'Etymologie' vs 'Woher kommt das Wort X?' — AI engines match on conversational query patterns.
findings.recommendation: Reframe H2/H3 as questions for top entries.

findings.title: Zero Common Crawl backlink footprint
findings.description: No referring domains in CC data — low authority signal for citation models.
findings.recommendation: Acquire Wikipedia, Wiktionary, and German-language media backlinks.

findings.title: .wtf TLD reduces AI trust signals
findings.description: Non-standard TLD requires compensating entity signals.
findings.recommendation: Wikipedia entity, .de backlinks, sameAs references to authoritative databases.

findings.title: No YouTube presence
findings.description: YouTube correlation with AI citations is ~0.737 — highest available signal.
findings.recommendation: Short dialect explainer videos with site URL in descriptions.

categories.name: Images
what_works: All images have alt text
Per-word OG images at /og/[word].png (1200x630) — correct dimensions
Homepage OG image present
Favicons complete (ico, svg, apple-touch-icon, safari-pinned-tab)

findings.title: OG image for homepage is non-generated (900x517)
findings.description: Homepage OG image is 900x517 (suboptimal — 1200x630 is the standard for Twitter/LinkedIn). Word pages correctly use 1200x630.
findings.recommendation: Regenerate homepage OG image at 1200x630.

findings.title: No WebP/AVIF OG images
findings.description: OG images are PNG — modern formats would reduce size.
findings.recommendation: Low priority — social platforms accept PNG fine.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Fix BreadcrumbList: strip .html suffix and use absolute URLs in schema builder — unblocks breadcrumb rich results for all 916 pages
robots.txt: Allow OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, PerplexityBot — unlocks ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity search visibility
Add H1 and meta description to /games/berliner-oder-nicht
Remove /settings, /settings/cache, /games/berliner-oder-nicht/share from sitemap; add noindex to those pages

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Create /public/llms.txt
Fix CSS double-loading (remove duplicate link tags)
Add Cache-Control headers via _headers file (max-age=3600 for HTML)
Add Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy headers to _headers
Add SearchAction potentialAction to WebSite schema
Add @id to Organization schema; update publisher references in DefinedTerm
Fix sitemap lastmod: use WordPress modified date per entry
Add Speakable schema to DefinedTerm word pages
Add VideoGame schema + BreadcrumbList to games page

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Create /ueber-das-projekt page (editorial methodology, E-E-A-T)
Add semantically-related 'Verwandte Wörter' section to word pages
Rewrite title template to include dialect context ('auf Berlinerisch')
Update meta description template to surface etymology/phonology differentiators
Add DefinedTermSet @id and numberOfItems
Add noindex to Datenschutz and Impressum pages
Enable IndexNow via Cloudflare dashboard
Build-time thin content gate: exclude entries with insufficient populated fields from sitemap
Wikipedia/Wiktionary citation outreach (20-30 top entries)

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Configure Google Search Console and submit sitemap
Configure Moz API for backlink monitoring
Set up PageSpeed Insights monitoring for CWV
Run drift baseline capture: python3 scripts/drift_baseline.py https://berliner-schnauze.wtf
Create etymology-category browse pages (Wörter aus dem Jiddischen, etc.)
YouTube channel for dialect explainer videos
Reddit presence on r/de, r/berlin, r/languagelearning
